title: Nirma University Law Merit List 2026

detail.title: Nirma University Law Merit List 2026
detail.short_info: Nirma University Law Merit List 2026 released. Check BA LLB, BBA LLB, BCom LLB (Hons.) merit list, admission status, and direct result link. Download now.

content.text: The Nirma University Law Merit List 2026 has been officially released for UG law admissions. Candidates who applied for B.A. LL.B. (Hons.), B.Com. LL.B. (Hons.), and B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.) can now check their selection status online through the official admission portal.

The merit list is prepared based on entrance scores and eligibility criteria set by the Institute of Law, Nirma University. Candidates shortlisted in the merit list must proceed with the counselling and admission process within the given timeline.

sections.heading: Overview of Nirma University Law Merit List 2026

rows: B.A. LL.B. (Hons.), B.Com. LL.B. (Hons.), B.B.A. LL.B. (Hons.)

sections.heading: Direct Link to Check Nirma University Law Merit List 2026

content.text: Check Merit List Here: Nirma University Law Merit List 2026
The merit list includes candidates selected for the following integrated law programs:

sections.heading: Key Details of Nirma University Law Merit List 2026

items: Conducting Authority: Institute of Law, Nirma University
Selection Basis: Entrance exam score + eligibility criteria

sections.heading: How to Check Nirma University Law Merit List 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to access your result:

items: Visit the official admission portal (link given above)
Navigate to the “Merit List / Admission Status” section
Check your name or application number
Download and save the merit list for future reference

content.text: Candidates should verify the following details:
If your name appears in the Nirma University Law Merit List 2026, follow these next steps:

items: Pay the admission fee within deadline

content.text: Failure to complete these steps may result in cancellation of admission.

items: Regularly check the official portal for updates
Verify all details carefully in the merit list
